overview: Mermaid is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 110 HP, 18 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack L at 150% ratio (270 base damage). Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilityies: Tail Attack L, Tail Attack R.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Melee Attack L (150%), Melee Attack R (150%), Tail Attack L (120%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Fascination
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Fascination icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Tail Attack L, Tail Attack R
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 2 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Tail Attack L, Tail Attack R. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilities: Tail Attack L, Tail Attack R

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
